= sum





Calculates the sum of numeric values in an array

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.sum = this.foo.sum()

# In:  {"foo":[3,8,4]}
# Out: {"sum":15}
----

[,bloblang]
----
# Works with decimals

root.total = this.prices.sum()

# In:  {"prices":[10.5,20.25,5.00]}
# Out: {"total":35.75}
----
